pi_items.source: Web fetch and search - verified as real, publicly available website
Web fetch - extracted from target_url domain
Web search and fetches - website contains 50 pages × 20 books per page = 1,000 books with one cover image each
Web fetches of multiple pages (page 1, page 2, page 50) - all images found use only .jpg extension. JPEG is same format as JPG. No PNG images detected in actual website content.
Task configuration verified against setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Task configuration verified against setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts

privileged_info_summary: books.toscrape.com is a real, public demo website for web scraping practice containing 1,000 books (50 pages × 20 per page) with approximately 1,000 cover images. All detected images use JPG format exclusively stored in media/cache/ directories with hash-based filenames. The metadata claim that PNG images are present (expected_extensions: ["jpg", "jpeg", "png"]) is contradicted by actual website analysis - only JPG images were found across multiple pages (page 1, page 2, page 50). The minimum image count claim of 100 is verified as accurate (actual: 1,000).
